publishedAbstract: * Failing to provision new Ceph volumes. * Error message from provisioner pods: 'failed to fetch monitor list using clusterID (openshift-storage): error fetching configuration for cluster ID openshift-storage: open /etc/ceph-csi-config/config.json: no such file or directory'. * NooBaa Failed to Transition to "Cluster" resource due to "Pending" PV/PVC * Some/All rook-csi secrets and configmaps are missing * Some/All ceph-csi secrets are missing * Some/All csi-x secrets are missing ~~~ $ oc get events-n openshift-storage 2h25m Warning ProvisioningFailed persistentvolumeclaim/noobaa-db-pg-cluster-1 failed to provision volume with StorageClass "ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd": error getting secret rook-csi-rbd-provisioner in namespace openshift-storage: secrets "rook-csi-rbd-provisioner" not found 2h43m Warning FailedMount pod/ocs-client-operator-console-5b4f7c7bf7-bwc6b MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "ocs-client-operator-console-xxx-conf": configmap "ocs-client-operator-console-xxx-conf" not found 2h44m Warning FailedMount pod/openshift-storage.cephfs.csi.ceph.com-ctrlplugin-8bbbfd888skftx MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "ceph-csi-config": configmap "ceph-csi-config" not found ~~~
publishedTitle: Failed OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) Upgrade from v4.18.x to v4.19.0 ocs-operator Bug causes CSI Error: "secrets/configmaps e.g. rook-csi-xxx-provisioner not found"
